verses.text: Lifting his eyes to the hills, the pilgrim asks where his help comes from, and answers: 'My help cometh from the LORD, which made heaven and earth.' Not the hills but their Maker is his hope. The Creator of all is the sure helper of those who look to Him.

Lifting his eyes to the hills, the pilgrim asks where his help comes from, and answers: 'My help cometh from the LORD, which made heaven and earth.' Not the hills but their Maker is his hope. The Creator of all is the sure helper of those who look to Him.
God will not let his foot slip, for 'he that keepeth Israel shall neither slumber nor sleep.' His watch never ceases. The believer rests because the One who guards him is always awake.
God will not let his foot slip, for 'he that keepeth Israel shall neither slumber nor sleep.' His watch never ceases. The believer rests because the One who guards him is always awake.
'The LORD is thy keeper,' a shade at the right hand, so the sun shall not smite by day nor the moon by night. He shields from every danger. No harm of day or night falls outside His protecting care.
'The LORD is thy keeper,' a shade at the right hand, so the sun shall not smite by day nor the moon by night. He shields from every danger. No harm of day or night falls outside His protecting care.

He will preserve from all evil and keep 'thy going out and thy coming in from this time forth, and even for evermore.' His care covers every step. Every journey and return of the believer is kept by God for ever.

He will preserve from all evil and keep 'thy going out and thy coming in from this time forth, and even for evermore.' His care covers every step. Every journey and return of the believer is kept by God for ever.
